title: フォーリング THE 運命☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've had an exhausting day, running in and out of the academy to
prepare for tomorrow's tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's going to be a big event, especially for runners hoping to get
scouted. As I walk home feeling nervous for tomorrow, I stumble upon
a curious sight.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm-hm-hm, hm-hm-hm! ♪
Hmm-hm-hm, hm-hm-hm-hmm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She isn't dressed up or even holding a mic—not to mention the
complete lack of an audience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite it all, she's pouring her heart into singing and dancing, almost
appearing to sparkle as the evening sun casts its light upon her.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I stop in my tracks to watch her—not from fatigue, but from the sheer
charm she exudes. Seeing her smile somehow fills me with energy,
both physically and mentally.
choice_data_list:
(You know what... Maybe I can get a little more
work done!)

(You know what... Maybe I can get a little more
work done!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though unable to stick around until the end, I offer her a round of
applause as thanks for her energizing performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day for tryouts finally arrives. Excited to see what the new batch
of racers will bring, I head to the academy in high spirits.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Voice, check. Air mic, check. Flyers, check. Perfect! I think I'm
ready! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hi, everyooone! Sorry to keep you waiting! It's me, Smart Falcon! I
hope I make your hearts race today! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It's time for Falco's special show, so heeere we gooo! First, I wanna
hear yo—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wait, waaaah?! You're the person from yesterday!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: The Falco Fan Club's very first member!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Woooow, what a coincidence! ☆ I actually wanted to talk to you!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But you left halfway through my show, so I missed my chance. I was
kinda sad you didn't watch 'til the end, but thanks for the applause! ☆

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
Wha—Smart Falcon! You're holding another one of your flash
concerts, aren't you?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oops, she caught me again. ☆

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
This is the fifteenth time this month! You're going to drive me crazy
with all these "cute and sparkly" acts of yours!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um, looks like you've become a fan! Thank you for your
support! ☆ But I can't say I like that angry attitude! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: With that said, I gotta run! ♪ C'mon! You're coming with me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea what's going on. Swept up in the moment, I end up
following Smart Falcon.

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: Hey! Come back here!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Phew... I think we lost her. We should be safe now. ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Geez, that was exhausting! ☆ Are you okay? Thanks for sticking with
me! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Let me reintroduce myself! My name's Smart Falcon, and I'm an
Umadol! You can call me Falco though! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: An Umadol—an Umamusume idol! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Umadols run like normal Umamusume... but they also inspire their
audience during winning concerts by shining onstage—like an idol!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
My dream is to become a top Umadol one day. That's why I'm doing
what I can to get my name out there every day! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But well... I don't have a trainer at the moment, so I don't think I'll be
racing anytime soon, let alone holding concerts...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Wait... Hold on!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ummm... A-are you... like... uhhh... a trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! I guess my luck's finally turned around!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Who would've thought my first fan would turn out to be a trainer?!
What a dramatic turn of events—perfect for an Umadol! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay, here's your contract! All you need to do is sign!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't have a pen? That's fine! I make sure to carry one on me at
all times, along with a full contract! After all, you never know when
you might get scouted! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, she's going to make me her trainer by force... I should get
to know her before this goes any further.
choice_data_list: Could I at least watch you run first?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Urk.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Y-you mean like... in a race? Like one of the ones today?
choice_data_list: Yes. Are you participating in today's tryouts?
Yes. Are you participating in today's tryouts?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Um... yeah... Technically speaking...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aw... I thought I'd be able to convince you with just my positive vibes...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Argh! Whatever! I can do this! Raaaagh! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'll run! But you have to promise that you'll keep your eyes
on me the whole time, got it? ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon seems to be trying a little too hard to hype herself up.
Just as I'm about to ask her why—

text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text: Get back here! Smaaart Faaalcooon!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Whoa, she's getting faster! Sorry, but I gotta go now! See ya later!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...In the end, I decide to see just how well this self-proclaimed
Umadol will run on the track.
